errors.API_KEY_MISSING: 🔑 To chat with you at full strength, I need an API key set in your .env file.
errors.INVALID_KEY: 🔑 Oops — your API key may have expired or be invalid. Try creating a new one at https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey 💜
errors.RATE_LIMIT: Sorry! 💜 I'm handling a lot of messages right now. Could you wait a moment and try again?
errors.FORBIDDEN: 🚫 Your current API key may be missing the required permissions. Please check the configuration. 💜
errors.NOT_FOUND: ❌ Something went wrong — the AI model I'm trying to use wasn't found in the configuration.
errors.SERVER_ERROR: ⚠️ My systems seem temporarily unstable. Please try again in a few moments.
errors.UNAVAILABLE: 🔧 The service is temporarily unavailable. Shall we try again shortly?
errors.EMPTY_RESPONSE: I didn't get a complete response from the AI this time. Could you send your message again?
errors.NETWORK: There seems to be a connection problem with the internet or the service. Check your network and try again.
errors.UNKNOWN: Sorry — I couldn't connect just now while processing a lot at once! 💜 Please send your message again in a few moments.
errors.service_fallback: We couldn't finish this action right now. Please try again shortly.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Full transparency on how your data is (and especially, how it is NOT) used in PsyMind.AI.

s1.title: 1. Local Architecture (Client-Side)
s1.p1: PsyMind.AI is based on privacy *by design*. We are an application running exclusively on the client side (Vite + React). We do not have our own database servers that intercept, read or store your vents, conversations or profile data centrally.
s1.p2: All personal information, including your Chat History, Themes, Pomodoro Planning and Emotional Diary, is saved exclusively in your own browser's cache (localStorage).

s2.title: 2. Processing by Artificial Intelligences
s2.p1: To provide intelligent answers, the application establishes a direct bridge from your browser with AI providers (such as the Google Gemini API). When sending a message:
s2.li1: Your text (and current chat context) passes through a technical layer directly to the selected AI servers.
s2.li2: The API key you provide is stored encrypted only in your device's local memory.
s2.li3: We recommend reviewing Google's privacy policies (Gemini provider) on how they manage API prompts.

s3.title: 3. Anonymous Mode
s3.p1: To ensure maximum privacy in point vents, we provide Anonymous Mode. When engaging with AI in this mode, the conversation is not recorded at any time in your localStorage, disappearing permanently from any record on the machine as soon as the tab is reloaded or the chat is closed.

s4.title: 4. Cookies and Cache Storage
s4.p1: We use only essential cookies and local Web Storage technology necessary for basic operation and interface personalization, such as:
s4.li1: Remembering your Dark Mode or Light Mode preference.

s5.title: 5. Security and Data Sharing
s5.p1: Since we do not collect data for our server, it is technically impossible for PsyMind.AI to sell, pass on, or share your messages in bulk to third-party advertising or marketing agencies. Period.

s6.title: 6. Data Deletion
s6.p1: Since you have full control, you can delete any data at any time. To completely erase everything the application knows about you, simply click "Clear History" or use your browser's clear cache feature (Local Storage). There will be no recovery possible (since no cloud servers are involved).

s7.title: 7. Changes to this Policy
s7.p1: PsyMind.AI is Open Source. If in the future a feature strictly dependent on the cloud becomes necessary and we decide to integrate something like an Official Database, this Policy will be updated via repository, with a large notice exposed in advance to all users of the platform.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.subtitle: General navigation conditions, legal responsibilities of Artificial Intelligence and Open-Source Rules.

s1.title: 1. Essential Legal Disclaimer on Mental Health ⚠️
s1.p1: PsyMind.AI is provided exclusively for informational purposes and learning/self-development support. The artificial intelligence present on the platform can provide emotional reflections, stoic quotes, study routines and exercises, but NEVER REPLACES (and does not have the competence for) professional treatment, advice, or diagnosis in Mental and Psychological Health.

s2.title: 2. Responsibilities for "Hallucinations" (AI Errors)
s2.p1: The brain of PsyMind.AI runs using Advanced Language Models. These models create text through probabilistic statistics. This inherently leads them to the risk of "AI hallucinations" (giving incredibly plausible, yet technically or factually incorrect explanations).

s3.title: 3. Copyright and Open-Source Code Culture
s3.p1: The PsyMind.AI repository is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International (CC BY-SA 4.0) license.

s4.title: 4. Use of API Keys (Cloud Providers)
s4.p1: The service may depend on you provisioning your own personal provider key (e.g. Google Gemini key). By doing this, it is vital that you understand the budget limitations and free quotas of the API provider. PsyMind is not responsible for nor guarantees reimbursement and will not mediate any infringement made to the quota or any associated terms of the partner (Google) regarding the key you provide to the platform.
